generated_note: Catalog manifest read by the Jarvis bench to populate `Jarvis Agent Listing`. This is a BUNDLED deploy artifact synced at migrate time — NEVER fetched by a container at runtime (security posture: bundles are reviewed code, not runtime-pulled).

domains.title: Audit & Ledger Scrutiny
domains.blurb: Reproducible ledger scrutiny with materiality-parameterised rules.

domains.title: Statutory Compliance
domains.blurb: India GST/TDS/Income-Tax checks. Statutory thresholds are dated & law-review gated.

domains.title: Close & Reporting
domains.blurb: Period-end: trial-balance integrity, materiality, misstatement aggregation.

domains.title: Accounts Payable
domains.blurb: Payables & expense: draft inbound documents through to the Approval Board.

domains.title: Analytical Review
domains.blurb: Schedule III ratios and year-over-year variance review.

agents.title: Ledger Scrutiny Auditor
agents.description: Read-only, reproducible ledger scrutiny. Computes engagement materiality, then evaluates deterministic rules (dormant ledgers, wrong-side balances, high-value cash transactions, vouchers large vs their ledger, year-over-year sign flips) against the general ledger and returns a severity-tagged, persisted findings list. Never writes.

agents.title: Statutory Compliance Auditor
agents.description: Read-only India statutory checks driven by DATED, cited threshold rules: s.40A(3) cash expense/creditor limits, s.269ST large cash receipts, s.43B statutory dues, MSME 45-day ageing. Every statutory finding carries its section, effective date, and a 'verify current law' disclaimer. Statutory rules ship inactive pending legal review. Never writes.

agents.title: Close & Reporting Auditor
agents.description: Read-only period-end integrity checks: the trial balance must balance (opening and closing), and no ledger may carry a material balance on the wrong side of its group. Structural and reproducible — the same books yield the same findings every run. Never writes; reports and hands off.

agents.title: AP & Expense Operator
agents.description: Drafts inbound payables and expense documents through to the Approval Board — never past it. Extends the proven inbound-document data-entry pattern: classify, extract verbatim, resolve masters, reconcile, create the Draft, queue approvals for real ambiguities. Every submit/destructive action always parks for a human.

agents.title: AR & Collections Operator
agents.description: Order-to-cash collections through the Approval Board — never past it. Pulls the AR ageing, ranks overdue customers, drafts firm dated-fact dunning emails (every outbound email parks for human approval; batches carry one bundled board decision), logs follow-ups, assigns collection tasks, and records receipts as Draft Payment Entries only against real evidence. Never submits, never reconciles, never writes off.

agents.title: Bank & Reconciliation Operator
agents.description: The reconciliation workbench as drafts and approvals: lists unreconciled Bank Transactions, proposes matches against submitted Payment Entries / invoices by reference, amount, date and party, and queues each proposal as a Jarvis Approval Request carrying both sides of the evidence. Unmatched lines become draft Payment Entry proposals. It proposes; a human confirms and reconciles every one — it never reconciles, allocates, or submits.

agents.title: Analytical Review Auditor
agents.description: Read-only year-over-year analytical review of the P&L. Computes engagement materiality, then evaluates deterministic analytics (expense-to-revenue ratio variance FPA-EXPENSE-VARIANCE-YOY, P&L year-over-year swings FPA-PL-YOY-SWING) and reports the findings verbatim with severities. When YoY analytics cannot run (no prior-year books, no materiality) it reports exactly that instead of improvising variances. Never writes.
